By selling lemons at 5 for a rupee, a man loses 34%. To gain 10% how many must he sell for a rupee? / 5 रुपये में 1 नींबू की दर से बेचने पर, एक व्यक्ति को 34% की हानि होती है। 10% का लाभ प्राप्त करने के लिए उसे एक रुपये में कितने नींबू बेचने चाहिए? (Note: Original image text is in English, this translation is provided if needed, but we output exact word-for-word image text: 'By selling lemons at 5 for a rupee, a man loses 34%. To gain 10% how many must he sell for a rupee?')

Options shown in green color with a tick icon are correct.
1. Options shown in green color with a tick icon are correct.
2. Chosen option on the right of the question indicates the option selected by the candidate.
